instruction: The arrow mark on the h3 icon has slipped out of place. Move it back to its original position.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/h3.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M20.905 14.626a4.52 4.52 0 0 1 .738 3.603c-.154.695-.794 1.143-1.504 1.208a15.194 15.194 0 0 1-3.639-.104m4.405-4.707a4.52 4.52 0 0 0 .738-3.603c-.154-.696-.794-1.144-1.504-1.209a15.19 15.19 0 0 0-3.639.104m4.405 4.708H18M2.243 4.493v7.5m0 0v7.502m0-7.501h10.5m0-7.5v7.5m0 0v7.501"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="120,100 132,112 128,104 132,112 124,108" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
